goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 16:45' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 16:45 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should go to bishops stortford
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
